title: International Travel Letters and Consultation - Foster Global
content:
## International Travel Letters and Consultation
- Individual International Travel Consultations – it is critical for traveling employees to have their documents in order and know how to navigate CBP inspection upon entry into the US. Whether the trip is work-related or personal, a problem upon reentry may affect your employee’s ability to return to work. Foster can help them prepare for upcoming international travel and identify any issues that may need to be addressed.
- International Travel Letters – Traveling employees may find that a letter explaining their legal status and confirming the legal basis for their entry to the US provides both reassurance and critical help whether entering the US for the first time or returning to the US after international travel. A Foster attorney can provide a letter explaining to CBP the legal basis of the employee’s US status and eligibility admission and address any questions the traveler may have about the immigration inspection process when going through customs .
- U.S. Temporary Work Visas
- U.S. Permanent Residency
- Work Visas Worldwide
- Form I-9 Audits and Training
- International Travel Letters and Consultation
- International Business Traveler Services
